title: ThunderStorm (stormsword)
description:
🌩️ StormSword – Strike With Lightning!
A Minecraft mod that brings electrifying weapons, custom villagers, and adventure to your world.

🛠️ Available Versions
Forge (Basic version):

✅ StormSword – summons lightning with each hit.

✅ Stormman Villager –
body:
The StormSword mod is available in two versions: Forge and NeoForge. Each version includes different features and content. Here's a detailed breakdown to help you choose the one that suits your playstyle best:

🔧 Forge Version
This is the older and simpler version of the mod.
Includes:

StormSword
A powerful sword that can summon lightning bolts.

Stormman Villager
A new villager profession that offers trades related to the StormSword.

⚠️ Note: This version is minimal and does not include advanced content like dungeons or ranged weapons.

⚡ NeoForge Version
This is the latest and most complete version of the mod.
Includes everything in the Forge version, plus:

Zeus Bow
A ranged weapon with the power of lightning.

Temple of Lightning (Dungeon)
A custom structure filled with loot like diamonds, amethyst, and lightning-related items.

Improved Stormman Villager
Additional trades and interaction with new items.

Bug fixes & updated features

🆕 Recommended if you want the full StormSword experience with adventure and new mechanics.
